name: distObjMethodRef::CallAsync_Phys
title: distObjMethodRef::CallAsync_Phys
description: Asynchronous call to a method member, i.e. the call does not wait for the function to be called and the return to be received. In test procedures, you can wait for the answer with TestWaitForAnswer; in simulation programs, you can use the handler on fct_Returned. In form 2, the callback function is called when the return is received.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
